violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (old hot water tank) were observed in the (rear storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The hand sinks are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink, black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Bagged ice purchased during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Black beans were observed being held (7) days past their date mark. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

ROP salmon, held at 37 degrees F., was observed thawed with packaging still intact. Thawing methods reviewed and salmon was removed from packages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The walk-in cooler is lacking an adequate door sweep. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The dishwasher located in the ice machine room was not in good repair. Unit has an active leak. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/ventilation unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
The condensate from the AC unit is draining into the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The floor beneath (basement) stairs, in the liquor room and wall in hookah area is in poor repair. Several openings were observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The fryolator area, liquor room and walk-in cooler has an accumulation of grease, food debris and soil residue. The basement has an accumulation of clutter and unused equipment (hot water tank). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
Food observed in direct contact with rodent droppings. Affected foods to be voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in direct contact with food and linens and dead rodent carcass. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Rodent carcass to be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

The door to the outside, located on the main floor, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
Food was observed stored directly under leaking sewage pipe. Food to be disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
Multiple structural openings observed in basement. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
